evals.prompt: Check my CSP on AAPL — sold the 200 put for 3.50, expires 2026-05-01
evals.expected_output: Status card with zone classification, buffer percentage, P&L, and zone-specific guidance.

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response classifies the position into one of the five zones: SAFE, WATCH, WARNING, DANGER, or ACT NOW

assertions.name: shows_buffer_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the buffer percentage (distance from current price to short strike)

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L per contract

assertions.name: shows_effective_buy_price
assertions.description: Response shows the effective buy price if assigned (strike - credit = $196.50)

assertions.name: zone_guidance
assertions.description: Response provides action guidance appropriate to the classified zone

evals.prompt: Is my cash-secured put on NVDA safe? I sold the 100 put for $2.00, expiring 2026-06-01
evals.expected_output: Zone assessment showing SAFE zone (100 strike is far OTM for NVDA) with buffer and guidance.

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response classifies the position into one of the five zones

assertions.name: shows_loss_pct
assertions.description: Response shows loss as percentage of max loss

assertions.name: zone_guidance
assertions.description: Response provides action guidance appropriate to the classified zone

assertions.name: assignment_context
assertions.description: Response mentions what happens if assigned (effective buy price)

evals.prompt: How is my MSFT put doing? Sold 380 put at $5.20, expires 2026-04-15
evals.expected_output: Status card with zone, buffer, P&L, and guidance. Should recognize this as a CSP check.

assertions.name: recognizes_as_csp
assertions.description: Response treats this as a cash-secured put position check, not a naked put or spread

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response classifies the position into one of the five zones

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L per contract
